# Fibich

> Fibich is a simple, powerful music player for macOS focused on organizing a music library and returning to favorite tracks.

Fibich is currently in development and is not yet available to download.

## Official pages

- Website: https://fibich.app/
- Product screenshot: https://fibich.app/assets/fibich-player-screenshot.png
- Creator: Antonin Charvat, https://www.linkedin.com/in/antonincharvat/

## Product facts

- Product name: Fibich
- Category: Music player
- Supported platform: macOS
- Availability: In development
